--- import Layout from '../layouts/Layout.astro'; import PageHero from '../components/PageHero.astro'; import SectionTitle from '../components/SectionTitle.astro'; import Stats from '../components/Stats.astro'; import TrustBadges from '../components/TrustBadges.astro'; import CTA from '../components/CTA.astro'; import Icon from '../components/Icon.astro'; import { company } from '../data/company'; import { stats } from '../data/stats'; const crumbs = [{ name: 'Home', href: '/' }, { name: 'About', href: '/about' }]; const values = [ { icon: 'shield', title: 'Integrity First', text: 'Transparent, conservative estimates and no high-pressure sales — ever.' }, { icon: 'award', title: 'Craftsmanship', text: 'In-house certified crews who treat every roof like their own.' }, { icon: 'leaf', title: 'Real Impact', text: 'Measurable carbon reduction on every system we install.' }, { icon: 'users', title: 'Customer Obsession', text: 'We earn the 5-star reviews one honest interaction at a time.' }, ]; const timeline = [ { year: '2009', title: 'Founded in Austin', text: 'Started as a two-person residential crew with a simple promise: do solar right.' }, { year: '2014', title: 'Commercial division', text: 'Expanded into commercial and industrial solar across Texas.' }, { year: '2019', title: 'Battery & storage', text: 'Added whole-home backup as storage technology came of age.' }, { year: '2023', title: 'EV & 8-state footprint', text: 'Launched EV charging and grew to serve eight states nationwide.' }, { year: '2026', title: '18,000+ systems', text: 'One of America’s most-trusted premium solar installers.' }, ]; ---

Our Story

Solar done the right way

{company.name} was founded on a frustration: too many solar companies overpromised, underdelivered and disappeared. We set out to be the opposite — a premium installer that treats customers honestly and builds systems that last.

Today, our in-house teams of NABCEP-certified engineers and installers have deployed over 412 megawatts of clean energy across eight states, saving our customers more than $94 million along the way.

From a single rooftop in Austin to homes, warehouses, farms and factories nationwide, our standard has never changed: do solar right, every single time.

{values.map((v) => (

{v.title}

{v.text}

))}
{timeline.map((t, i) => (
{i < timeline.length - 1 &&
} {t.year.slice(2)}

{t.title} · {t.year}

{t.text}

))}

We're hiring across the country.`} image="/images/team/careers-hero.jpg" imageAlt="Apex Solar team members collaborating on a project" crumbs={crumbs} />

--- import Layout from '../layouts/Layout.astro'; import Hero from '../components/Hero.astro'; import Stats from '../components/Stats.astro'; import SectionTitle from '../components/SectionTitle.astro'; import ServicesGrid from '../components/ServicesGrid.astro'; import Calculator from '../components/Calculator.astro'; import ProjectGrid from '../components/ProjectGrid.astro'; import TestimonialSlider from '../components/TestimonialSlider.astro'; import FAQAccordion from '../components/FAQAccordion.astro'; import BlogGrid from '../components/BlogGrid.astro'; import LocationGrid from '../components/LocationGrid.astro'; import TrustBadges from '../components/TrustBadges.astro'; import CTA from '../components/CTA.astro'; import Icon from '../components/Icon.astro'; import { stats } from '../data/stats'; import { servicesByCategory } from '../data/services'; import { featuredProjects } from '../data/projects'; import { homeFaqs } from '../data/faqs'; import { company } from '../data/company'; import { getPublishedPosts } from '../lib/blog'; import { faqSchema, localBusinessSchema, serviceSchema } from '../lib/schema'; const posts = (await getPublishedPosts()).slice(0, 3); const residential = servicesByCategory('residential'); const commercial = servicesByCategory('commercial'); const whyUs = [ { icon: 'users', title: 'In-House Expert Crews', text: 'NABCEP-certified W-2 installers — never subcontractors — on every job.' }, { icon: 'shield', title: '25-Year Warranty', text: 'Production, product and workmanship, all backed by a leak-free guarantee.' }, { icon: 'dollar', title: '$0-Down Financing', text: 'Plans where your payment is often lower than the bill it replaces.' }, { icon: 'trending-up', title: 'Bankable Savings', text: 'Transparent, conservative modeling — most customers beat their estimate.' }, { icon: 'monitor', title: '24/7 Monitoring', text: 'We watch your production and fix issues before you ever notice.' }, { icon: 'award', title: 'Award-Winning Service', text: `${company.ratings.value}★ across ${company.ratings.count.toLocaleString()}+ verified reviews nationwide.` }, ]; const schemas = [ localBusinessSchema(), faqSchema(homeFaqs.map((f) => ({ question: f.question, answer: f.answer }))), serviceSchema({ name: 'Solar Energy Installation', description: company.description, url: '/services' }), ]; --- import Layout from '../layouts/Layout.astro'; import PageHero from '../components/PageHero.astro'; import SectionTitle from '../components/SectionTitle.astro'; import FAQAccordion from '../components/FAQAccordion.astro'; import CTA from '../components/CTA.astro'; import Icon from '../components/Icon.astro'; import { getFaqs } from '../data/faqs'; const crumbs = [{ name: 'Home', href: '/' }, { name: 'Solar Tax Credits', href: '/tax-credits' }]; const faqs = getFaqs(['tax-credit', 'financing', 'battery-cost', 'commercial-roi']); const steps = [ { n: '1', title: 'Install your system', text: 'Have your solar (and/or battery) system installed and placed in service.' }, { n: '2', title: 'Keep your invoice', text: 'Save the final paid invoice — it documents your total qualified cost.' }, { n: '3', title: 'File IRS Form 5695', text: 'Claim 30% of your cost on your federal return for that tax year.' }, { n: '4', title: 'Roll forward any excess', text: 'If the credit exceeds your tax owed, the remainder carries to next year.' }, ]; const qualifies = ['Solar panels & inverters', 'Battery storage (3 kWh+)', 'Racking & mounting', 'Electrical & wiring', 'Labor & installation', 'Permitting & inspection']; ---

The Big One

A 30% dollar-for-dollar credit

The federal solar tax credit reduces your federal income taxes by 30% of your total system cost — not a deduction, a direct credit. On a $24,000 system, that's $7,200 back.

It applies to ownership purchases and solar loans (not leases or PPAs), and any unused portion rolls forward to future tax years.

This page is general information, not tax advice. Confirm your eligibility with a qualified tax professional.

Example: $24,000 system

System cost$24,000
30% federal credit– $7,200
Net cost$16,800
